modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Security sticker missing from credit card machine, needs replacement.

full_description_text: 
I was on the call with a user who said the security sticker on their credit card machine fell off. They mentioned they need a new tamper-proof sticker for the replacement machine. It seems like this is important for keeping the machine secure.
short_description: Security sticker missing from credit card machine, needs replacement.
description: I was on the call with a user who said the security sticker on their credit card machine fell off. They mentioned they need a new tamper-proof sticker for the replacement machine. It seems like this is important for keeping the machine secure.
